summary: TWO_PART: top strip of 16 labeled cells showing chi(n) for n=1..16 (GREY 0 on evens, GREEN +1 on 4k+1, RED -1 on 4k+3). Bottom 5x5 table for m,n ∈ {1,3,5,7,9} displays chi(mn) values, confirming the multiplicative identity. Right-bottom verification Tex + MathTex + Indicate highlights chi(3)*chi(7) = chi(21) = +1.
